heading: Limitation on assistance
label: 3458 Limitation on assistance
text: In carrying out this subchapter, the Secretary shall provide technical assistance and financial assistance with respect to not more than 450 active designated areas.
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 3458, , , , related to program evaluation, prior to the general amendment of this subchapter by .Pub. L. 97–98, title XV, § 153595 Stat. 1340Pub. L. 107–171Dec. 22, 1981
